channel.title: Repository-Level on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Repository-Level on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Repository-level GitHub Copilot usage metrics generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics REST API now includes repository-level activity. Two new endpoints provide a daily per-repository breakdown of pull request activity for Copilot coding agent and Copilot code review.

  • Source: GitHub
